programs.title: Teen Titans Go!
programs.desc: Robin's streak is in jeopardy when his team is poached by Kid Flash.

programs.title: Shaun the Sheep
programs.desc: When one of the pigs attempts to make friends with Timmy, his cohort evict him as punishment for un-pig-like behaviour. The sheep take him into the barn and attempt to transform him into the epitome of porcine sophistication.

programs.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programs.sub_title: The Wedding Witch of Wainsly Hall!
programs.desc: Scooby and our gang of mystery solving teens have been invited by famous comedian Jeff Foxworthy to help him move an old mansion that he's just purchased.

programs.title: We Baby Bears
programs.desc: The Bears accidentally summon three mysterious witches and have to figure out how to get them back home.

programs.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programs.desc: When Buttercup loses the Professor's latest invention, she'll have to beat The Gangreen Gang at their own game to get it back.

programs.title: Open Season: Call Of Nature
programs.desc: With his wagon bursting at the seams, Weenie is revealed to be something of an obsessive collector, so Giselle suggests that he clear out all of his old stuff by having a yard sale. But can Weenie let go of the past?
